text.content:
Injuries • Radiant • Blinding Euphoria

Injury Card

Blinding Euphoria

The radiant magic coursing through you overwhelms your senses, causing a brief moment of euphoria. However, the intensity of the light leaves your vision temporarily dazzled.

Sacred Light
Treatment

Rest in a dark environment and avoid exposure to bright light.

Details

  • Category: Radiant

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 10

  • Status Effect: Blind

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • journaltype: injury

  • category: Radiant

  • odds: 50

  • foldername: Injuries

  • title: Blinding Euphoria

  • imagetitle: Sacred Light

  • image: icons/magic/sonic/explosion-shock-wave-teal.webp

  • description: The radiant magic coursing through you overwhelms your senses, causing a brief moment of euphoria. However, the intensity of the light leaves your vision temporarily dazzled.

  • treatment: Rest in a dark environment and avoid exposure to bright light.

  • severity: Minor

  • damage: 2

  • duration: 60

  • action: Apply the Radiant Injury

  • statuseffect: Blind

Injuries • Radiant • Celestial Bruising

Injury Card

Celestial Bruising

The radiant force strikes you, leaving behind vibrant, otherworldly bruises that pulse with soft light. Despite their beauty, they ache with a divine intensity.

Holy Wound
Treatment

Rest and apply a soothing balm to ease the discomfort.

Details

  • Category: Radiant

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 7 Hit Points

  • Duration: 20

  • Status Effect: none

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • treatment: Rest and apply a soothing balm to ease the discomfort.

  • damage: 7

  • duration: 120

  • action: Apply the Radiant Injury

  • statuseffect: none

Injuries • Radiant • Celestial Shimmer

Injury Card

Celestial Shimmer

The affected area emits a soft, radiant glow that flickers like distant stars on a clear night. It causes a mild feeling of euphoria but leaves the skin slightly sensitive to magical auras.

Aurora Glide
Treatment

Rest and exposure to natural light help to dissipate the celestial aura.

Details

  • Category: Radiant

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

  • Duration: 250

  • Status Effect: none

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • treatment: Rest and exposure to natural light help to dissipate the celestial aura.

  • damage: 3

  • duration: 1500

  • action: Apply the Radiant Injury

  • statuseffect: none

Injuries • Radiant • Celestial Sunburn

Injury Card

Celestial Sunburn

After being exposed to a burst of radiant energy, your skin starts to shimmer with faint divine light, causing discomfort and sensitivity to sunlight. You feel like a walking beacon of celestial energy.

Divine Glow
Treatment

Applying a soothing salve made of aloe vera leaves and holy water can help alleviate the discomfort and reduce the glowing effect.

Details

  • Category: Radiant

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

  • Duration: 50

  • Status Effect: Prone

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • journaltype: injury

  • category: Radiant

  • odds: 50

  • foldername: Injuries

  • treatment: Applying a soothing salve made of aloe vera leaves and holy water can help alleviate the discomfort and reduce the glowing effect.

  • severity: Minor

  • damage: 3

  • duration: 300

  • action: Apply the Radiant Injury

  • statuseffect: Prone

Injuries • Radiant • Cherubic Sunburn

Injury Card

Cherubic Sunburn

A burst of radiant energy envelops you, leaving your skin tingling and red as if you spent too much time basking under the celestial sun.

Heavenly Burn
Treatment

Apply aloe vera or a cooling salve to soothe the affected skin.

Details

  • Category: Radiant

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

  • Duration: 10

  • Status Effect: none

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • damage: 3

  • action: Apply the Radiant Injury

Injuries • Radiant • Heavenly Glare

Injury Card

Heavenly Glare

A bright beam of radiant energy sears the affected area. The skin takes on a subtle, luminescent quality, giving off a soft light that attracts small creatures. It feels as if a small sun is trapped under the skin, warming from within.

Divine Sparkle
Treatment

Rest, holy water baths, and prayers to radiant deities can help soothe the celestial burn.

Details

  • Category: Radiant

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 6 Hit Points

  • Duration: 400

  • Status Effect: Charmed

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • category: Radiant

  • treatment: Rest, holy water baths, and prayers to radiant deities can help soothe the celestial burn.

  • severity: Moderate

  • damage: 6

  • duration: 2400

  • action: Apply the Radiant Injury

  • statuseffect: Charmed

Injuries • Radiant • Lightburn

Injury Card

Lightburn

The afflicted area glows with a warm light, causing discomfort. It feels like being sunburnt by a celestial being. The radiance gradually fades but leaves the skin tender to the touch.

Dawn Strike
Treatment

Cooling salves and magical healing can alleviate the discomfort.

Details

  • Category: Radiant

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 300

  • Status Effect: Deafened

Injuries • Radiant • Luminous Wrath

Injury Card

Luminous Wrath

A burst of blinding radiant light engulfs the area, leaving behind an otherworldly mark. The skin becomes translucent, revealing an inner glow that can be seen faintly pulsing. It feels like having a miniature star trapped within, radiating heat and light.

Hallowed Burst
Treatment

Potent healing magic or divine intervention may be required to diminish the radiant essence infused within the body.

Details

  • Category: Radiant

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 11 Hit Points

  • Duration: 600

  • Status Effect: Exhaustion

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • category: Radiant

  • odds: 15

  • treatment: Potent healing magic or divine intervention may be required to diminish the radiant essence infused within the body.

  • severity: Major

  • damage: 11

  • duration: 3600

  • action: Apply the Radiant Injury

  • statuseffect: Exhaustion

Injuries • Radiant • Radiant Overload

Injury Card

Radiant Overload

A surge of radiant power overwhelms you, causing your skin to glow brightly and emit a soft light. The excess energy burns within, threatening to consume you if not controlled.

Luminous Catastrophe
Treatment

Seek out a skilled healer to help regulate the radiant energy within you.

Details

  • Category: Radiant

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 11 Hit Points

  • Duration: 50

  • Status Effect: Poisoned

Metadata
